hero.headline: Pinto Spirits
hero.subtitle: Building the brands that bartenders believe in — from distillery floor to venue floor.

about.heading: About Pinto Spirits
about.body_1: Paul Slater has spent over fifteen years at the sharp end of premium spirits — from building Starwards into one of Melbourne's most respected craft labels, to leading brand development for Archie Rose Distilling Co. in Sydney.
about.body_2: Pinto Spirits is his independent incubator: a curated collective of extraordinary local producers who deserve the same stage as the world's great spirit brands. We handle on-trade strategy, brand education, and venue placement — everything between a great liquid and the right glass.
about.quote: Fifteen years building brands that bartenders believe in.

brands.intro: Three distinct brands. Each chosen for character, craft, and the story behind the bottle.

items.name: Kinglake Distillery
items.tagline: A story told in every dram.
items.story: A story of craft, patience, and Australian terroir. This brand represents the pinnacle of local distilling — each batch a conversation between grain, water, and time.

items.name: Brand Two
items.story: Botanicals sourced from across Victoria's diverse landscapes — from coastal sea herbs to alpine wildflowers. A gin built for the bartenders who demand more.

items.name: Brand Three
items.story: Queensland sugarcane meets meticulous small-batch distilling. An Australian rum with the depth and complexity to sit alongside the world's finest.
